parameters.query:
WITH last_seen AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(MAX(execution_id::bigint), 0) AS last_id
  FROM public.executions
  WHERE instance_id = '{{ $json.INSTANCE_ID }}'
),
refresh AS (
  SELECT execution_id::bigint AS id
  FROM public.executions
  WHERE instance_id = 'prod'
    AND (
      finished = false
      OR status IN ('running','waiting')
      OR stopped_at IS NULL
    )
  ORDER BY execution_id::bigint DESC
  LIMIT 200
)
SELECT
  (SELECT last_id FROM last_seen) AS last_id,
  COALESCE(json_agg(id), '[]'::json) AS refresh_ids
FROM refresh;

WITH params AS (
  SELECT
    {{ Number($json.lastId) }}::bigint AS last_id,
    ARRAY[ {{ ($json.refreshIds || []).join(',') || 'NULL' }} ]::bigint[] AS refresh_ids,
    {{ Number($json.newLimit ?? 200) }}::int AS new_limit
),

new_rows AS (
  SELECT * FROM (
    SELECT
      e.id AS id,
      e.id::text AS "executionId",
      e."workflowId"::text AS "workflowId",
      e.status,
      e.finished,
      e.mode,
      e."startedAt",
      e."stoppedAt",
      e."waitTill",
      e."retryOf",
      e."retrySuccessId",
      COALESCE(octet_length(ed.data), 0) AS "dataBytesLen",
      (ed.data IS NOT NULL) AS "hasData",
      0 AS priority
    FROM execution_entity e
    LEFT JOIN execution_data ed ON ed."executionId" = e.id
    CROSS JOIN params p
    WHERE p.last_id > 0
      AND e.id > p.last_id
    ORDER BY e.id
    LIMIT (SELECT new_limit FROM params)
  ) inc

  UNION ALL

  SELECT * FROM (
    SELECT
      e.id AS id,
      e.id::text AS "executionId",
      e."workflowId"::text AS "workflowId",
      e.status,
      e.finished,
      e.mode,
      e."startedAt",
      e."stoppedAt",
      e."waitTill",
      e."retryOf",
      e."retrySuccessId",
      COALESCE(octet_length(ed.data), 0) AS "dataBytesLen",
      (ed.data IS NOT NULL) AS "hasData",
      0 AS priority
    FROM execution_entity e
    LEFT JOIN execution_data ed ON ed."executionId" = e.id
    CROSS JOIN params p
    WHERE p.last_id = 0
    ORDER BY e.id DESC
    LIMIT (SELECT new_limit FROM params)
  ) boot
),

refresh_rows AS (
  SELECT
    e.id AS id,
    e.id::text AS "executionId",
    e."workflowId"::text AS "workflowId",
    e.status,
    e.finished,
    e.mode,
    e."startedAt",
    e."stoppedAt",
    e."waitTill",
    e."retryOf",
    e."retrySuccessId",
    COALESCE(octet_length(ed.data), 0) AS "dataBytesLen",
    (ed.data IS NOT NULL) AS "hasData",
    1 AS priority
  FROM execution_entity e
  LEFT JOIN execution_data ed ON ed."executionId" = e.id
  CROSS JOIN params p
  WHERE p.refresh_ids IS NOT NULL
    AND e.id = ANY(p.refresh_ids)
)

SELECT DISTINCT ON (id) *
FROM (
  SELECT * FROM new_rows
  UNION ALL
  SELECT * FROM refresh_rows
) x
ORDER BY id, priority DESC;

SELECT
  e.id::text AS "executionId",
  e."workflowId"::text AS "workflowId",
  e.status,
  e.finished,
  e.mode,
  e."startedAt",
  e."stoppedAt",
  e."waitTill",
  e."retryOf",
  e."retrySuccessId",
  ed.data,
  w.nodes AS "workflowNodes"
FROM execution_entity e
JOIN execution_data ed ON ed."executionId" = e.id
LEFT JOIN workflow_entity w ON w.id = e."workflowId"
WHERE e.id = ANY(ARRAY[ {{ $json.executionIds.join(',') }} ]::int[])
  AND octet_length(ed.data) <= {{ Number($json.maxBytes) }}
ORDER BY e.id;

WITH j AS (SELECT $1::jsonb AS j),

payload AS (
  SELECT
    j->>'instanceId'                                AS instance_id,
    j->>'executionId'                               AS execution_id,
    NULLIF(j->>'workflowId','')                     AS workflow_id,
    NULLIF(j->>'status','')                         AS status_raw,
    NULLIF(j->>'mode','')                           AS mode,
    NULLIF(j->>'startedAt','null')::timestamptz     AS started_at,
    NULLIF(j->>'stoppedAt','null')::timestamptz     AS stopped_at_in,
    NULLIF(j->>'waitTill','null')::timestamptz      AS wait_till,
    NULLIF(j->>'retryOf','null')                    AS retry_of,
    NULLIF(j->>'retrySuccessId','null')             AS retry_success_id,
    NULLIF(j->>'lastNodeExecuted','null')           AS last_node_executed,
    COALESCE(j->'nodeNamesExecuted', '[]'::jsonb)   AS node_names_executed,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(j->>'nodesCount','null')::int, 0) AS nodes_count,
    NULLIF(j->>'durationMs','null')::bigint         AS duration_ms_in,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(j->>'finished','null')::boolean, false) AS finished_in
  FROM j
),

norm AS (
  SELECT
    *,
    (status_raw IN ('success','error','failed','canceled','crashed')) AS is_final,

    CASE
      WHEN status_raw IN ('success','error','failed','canceled','crashed') THEN true
      ELSE finished_in
    END AS finished_norm,

    CASE
      WHEN status_raw IN ('success','error','failed','canceled','crashed')
        THEN COALESCE(stopped_at_in, started_at, now())
      ELSE COALESCE(stopped_at_in, started_at, now())
    END AS stopped_at_norm,

    COALESCE(duration_ms_in, 0) AS duration_ms_norm
  FROM payload
)

INSERT INTO public.executions
(
  instance_id,
  execution_id,
  workflow_id,
  status,
  finished,
  mode,
  started_at,
  stopped_at,
  duration_ms,
  wait_till,
  retry_of,
  retry_success_id,
  last_node_executed,
  node_names_executed,
  nodes_count
)
SELECT
  instance_id,
  execution_id,
  workflow_id,
  status_raw,
  finished_norm,
  mode,
  started_at,
  stopped_at_norm,
  duration_ms_norm,
  wait_till,
  retry_of,
  retry_success_id,
  last_node_executed,
  node_names_executed,
  nodes_count
FROM norm

ON CONFLICT (instance_id, execution_id)
DO UPDATE SET

  status = CASE
    WHEN executions.status IN ('success','error','failed','canceled','crashed')
         AND EXCLUDED.status IN ('running','waiting')
      THEN executions.status
    ELSE EXCLUDED.status
  END,

  finished = CASE
    WHEN executions.status IN ('success','error','failed','canceled','crashed') THEN true
    WHEN EXCLUDED.status IN ('success','error','failed','canceled','crashed') THEN true
    ELSE EXCLUDED.finished
  END,

  stopped_at = CASE
    WHEN EXCLUDED.status IN ('success','error','failed','canceled','crashed')
      THEN COALESCE(EXCLUDED.stopped_at, executions.stopped_at, now())
    ELSE COALESCE(executions.stopped_at, EXCLUDED.stopped_at, now())
  END,

  workflow_id = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.workflow_id, executions.workflow_id),
  mode = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.mode, executions.mode),
  started_at = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.started_at, executions.started_at),
  duration_ms = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.duration_ms, executions.duration_ms, 0),
  wait_till = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.wait_till, executions.wait_till),
  retry_of = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.retry_of, executions.retry_of),
  retry_success_id = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.retry_success_id, executions.retry_success_id),
  last_node_executed = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.last_node_executed, executions.last_node_executed),
  node_names_executed = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.node_names_executed, executions.node_names_executed),
  nodes_count = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.nodes_count, executions.nodes_count);

WITH j AS (SELECT $1::jsonb AS j),

upd AS (
  UPDATE public.execution_nodes n
  SET
    workflow_id = COALESCE(NULLIF(j.j->>'workflowId','null'), n.workflow_id),
    node_type   = COALESCE(NULLIF(j.j->>'nodeType','null'), n.node_type),
    runs_count  = COALESCE(NULLIF(j.j->>'runsCount','null')::int, n.runs_count),

    is_last_run = COALESCE(
      CASE WHEN jsonb_typeof(j.j->'isLastRun') = 'boolean' THEN (j.j->>'isLastRun')::boolean END,
      NULLIF(j.j->>'isLastRun','null')::boolean,
      n.is_last_run
    ),

    execution_status  = COALESCE(NULLIF(j.j->>'executionStatus','null'), n.execution_status),
    execution_time_ms = COALESCE(NULLIF(j.j->>'executionTimeMs','null')::bigint, n.execution_time_ms),

    start_time_ms = COALESCE(NULLIF(j.j->>'startTimeMs','null')::bigint, n.start_time_ms),
    start_time    = COALESCE(
      NULLIF(j.j->>'startTimeIso','null')::timestamptz,
      CASE
        WHEN NULLIF(j.j->>'startTimeMs','null') IS NOT NULL
          THEN to_timestamp((j.j->>'startTimeMs')::double precision / 1000.0)::timestamptz
      END,
      n.start_time
    ),

    items_out_count = COALESCE(NULLIF(j.j->>'itemsOutCount','null')::int, n.items_out_count),
    items_out_total_all_runs = COALESCE(NULLIF(j.j->>'itemsOutTotalAllRuns','null')::int, n.items_out_total_all_runs)

  FROM j
  WHERE n.instance_id  = j.j->>'instanceId'
    AND n.execution_id = j.j->>'executionId'
    AND n.node_name    = j.j->>'nodeName'
    AND n.run_index    = COALESCE(NULLIF(j.j->>'runIndex','')::int, 0)
  RETURNING 1
)

INSERT INTO public.execution_nodes
(
  instance_id,
  execution_id,
  workflow_id,
  node_name,
  node_type,
  run_index,
  runs_count,
  is_last_run,
  execution_status,
  execution_time_ms,
  start_time_ms,
  start_time,
  items_out_count,
  items_out_total_all_runs
)
SELECT
  j.j->>'instanceId',
  j.j->>'executionId',
  NULLIF(j.j->>'workflowId','null'),
  j.j->>'nodeName',
  NULLIF(j.j->>'nodeType','null'),
  COALESCE(NULLIF(j.j->>'runIndex','')::int, 0),
  COALESCE(NULLIF(j.j->>'runsCount','null')::int, 1),

  COALESCE(
    CASE WHEN jsonb_typeof(j.j->'isLastRun') = 'boolean' THEN (j.j->>'isLastRun')::boolean END,
    false
  ),

  COALESCE(NULLIF(j.j->>'executionStatus','null'), 'unknown'),
  COALESCE(NULLIF(j.j->>'executionTimeMs','null')::bigint, 0),

  NULLIF(j.j->>'startTimeMs','null')::bigint,
  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(j.j->>'startTimeIso','null')::timestamptz,
    CASE
      WHEN NULLIF(j.j->>'startTimeMs','null') IS NOT NULL
        THEN to_timestamp((j.j->>'startTimeMs')::double precision / 1000.0)::timestamptz
    END
  ),

  COALESCE(NULLIF(j.j->>'itemsOutCount','null')::int, 0),
  COALESCE(NULLIF(j.j->>'itemsOutTotalAllRuns','null')::int, 0)

FROM j
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM upd)
  AND NULLIF(j.j->>'workflowId','null') IS NOT NULL
  AND NULLIF(j.j->>'nodeType','null') IS NOT NULL;

WITH j AS (SELECT $1::jsonb AS j),
rt AS (SELECT COALESCE(j.j->>'rowType','') AS row_type FROM j)

, exec_payload AS (
  SELECT
    j.j->>'instanceId'                                AS instance_id,
    j.j->>'executionId'                               AS execution_id,
    NULLIF(j.j->>'workflowId','')                     AS workflow_id,
    NULLIF(j.j->>'status','')                         AS status_raw,
    NULLIF(j.j->>'mode','')                           AS mode,
    NULLIF(j.j->>'startedAt','null')::timestamptz     AS started_at,
    NULLIF(j.j->>'stoppedAt','null')::timestamptz     AS stopped_at_in,
    NULLIF(j.j->>'waitTill','null')::timestamptz      AS wait_till,
    NULLIF(j.j->>'retryOf','null')                    AS retry_of,
    NULLIF(j.j->>'retrySuccessId','null')             AS retry_success_id,
    NULLIF(j.j->>'lastNodeExecuted','null')           AS last_node_executed,
    COALESCE(j.j->'nodeNamesExecuted', '[]'::jsonb)   AS node_names_executed,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(j.j->>'nodesCount','null')::int, 0) AS nodes_count,
    NULLIF(j.j->>'durationMs','null')::bigint         AS duration_ms_in,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(j.j->>'finished','null')::boolean, false) AS finished_in
  FROM j, rt
  WHERE rt.row_type = 'execution'
),
exec_norm AS (
  SELECT
    *,
    CASE
      WHEN status_raw IN ('success','error','failed','canceled','crashed') THEN true
      ELSE finished_in
    END AS finished_norm,
    CASE
      WHEN status_raw IN ('success','error','failed','canceled','crashed')
        THEN COALESCE(stopped_at_in, started_at, now())
      ELSE COALESCE(stopped_at_in, started_at, now())
    END AS stopped_at_norm,
    COALESCE(duration_ms_in, 0) AS duration_ms_norm
  FROM exec_payload
),
exec_upsert AS (
  INSERT INTO public.executions
  (
    instance_id,
    execution_id,
    workflow_id,
    status,
    finished,
    mode,
    started_at,
    stopped_at,
    duration_ms,
    wait_till,
    retry_of,
    retry_success_id,
    last_node_executed,
    node_names_executed,
    nodes_count
  )
  SELECT
    instance_id,
    execution_id,
    workflow_id,
    status_raw,
    finished_norm,
    mode,
    started_at,
    stopped_at_norm,
    duration_ms_norm,
    wait_till,
    retry_of,
    retry_success_id,
    last_node_executed,
    node_names_executed,
    nodes_count
  FROM exec_norm
  ON CONFLICT (instance_id, execution_id)
  DO UPDATE SET
    status = CASE
      WHEN executions.status IN ('success','error','failed','canceled','crashed')
           AND EXCLUDED.status IN ('running','waiting')
        THEN executions.status
      ELSE EXCLUDED.status
    END,
    finished = CASE
      WHEN executions.status IN ('success','error','failed','canceled','crashed') THEN true
      WHEN EXCLUDED.status IN ('success','error','failed','canceled','crashed') THEN true
      ELSE EXCLUDED.finished
    END,
    stopped_at = CASE
      WHEN EXCLUDED.status IN ('success','error','failed','canceled','crashed')
        THEN COALESCE(EXCLUDED.stopped_at, executions.stopped_at, now())
      ELSE COALESCE(executions.stopped_at, EXCLUDED.stopped_at, now())
    END,
    workflow_id = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.workflow_id, executions.workflow_id),
    mode = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.mode, executions.mode),
    started_at = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.started_at, executions.started_at),
    duration_ms = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.duration_ms, executions.duration_ms, 0),
    wait_till = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.wait_till, executions.wait_till),
    retry_of = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.retry_of, executions.retry_of),
    retry_success_id = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.retry_success_id, executions.retry_success_id),
    last_node_executed = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.last_node_executed, executions.last_node_executed),
    node_names_executed = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.node_names_executed, executions.node_names_executed),
    nodes_count = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.nodes_count, executions.nodes_count)
  RETURNING 'execution'::text AS inserted_type
)

, node_upd AS (
  UPDATE public.execution_nodes n
  SET
    workflow_id = COALESCE(NULLIF(j.j->>'workflowId','null'), n.workflow_id),
    node_type   = COALESCE(NULLIF(j.j->>'nodeType','null'), n.node_type),
    runs_count  = COALESCE(NULLIF(j.j->>'runsCount','null')::int, n.runs_count),
    is_last_run = COALESCE(
      CASE WHEN jsonb_typeof(j.j->'isLastRun')='boolean' THEN (j.j->>'isLastRun')::boolean END,
      NULLIF(j.j->>'isLastRun','null')::boolean,
      n.is_last_run
    ),
    execution_status  = COALESCE(NULLIF(j.j->>'executionStatus','null'), n.execution_status),
    execution_time_ms = COALESCE(NULLIF(j.j->>'executionTimeMs','null')::bigint, n.execution_time_ms),
    start_time_ms = COALESCE(NULLIF(j.j->>'startTimeMs','null')::bigint, n.start_time_ms),
    start_time = COALESCE(
      NULLIF(j.j->>'startTimeIso','null')::timestamptz,
      CASE
        WHEN NULLIF(j.j->>'startTimeMs','null') IS NOT NULL
          THEN to_timestamp((j.j->>'startTimeMs')::double precision / 1000.0)::timestamptz
      END,
      n.start_time
    ),
    items_out_count = COALESCE(NULLIF(j.j->>'itemsOutCount','null')::int, n.items_out_count),
    items_out_total_all_runs = COALESCE(NULLIF(j.j->>'itemsOutTotalAllRuns','null')::int, n.items_out_total_all_runs)
  FROM j, rt
  WHERE rt.row_type = 'execution_node'
    AND n.instance_id  = j.j->>'instanceId'
    AND n.execution_id = j.j->>'executionId'
    AND n.node_name    = j.j->>'nodeName'
    AND n.run_index    = COALESCE(NULLIF(j.j->>'runIndex','')::int, 0)
  RETURNING 1
),
node_ins AS (
  INSERT INTO public.execution_nodes
  (
    instance_id,
    execution_id,
    workflow_id,
    node_name,
    node_type,
    run_index,
    runs_count,
    is_last_run,
    execution_status,
    execution_time_ms,
    start_time_ms,
    start_time,
    items_out_count,
    items_out_total_all_runs
  )
  SELECT
    j.j->>'instanceId',
    j.j->>'executionId',
    NULLIF(j.j->>'workflowId','null'),
    j.j->>'nodeName',
    NULLIF(j.j->>'nodeType','null'),
    COALESCE(NULLIF(j.j->>'runIndex','')::int, 0),
    COALESCE(NULLIF(j.j->>'runsCount','null')::int, 1),
    COALESCE(
      CASE WHEN jsonb_typeof(j.j->'isLastRun')='boolean' THEN (j.j->>'isLastRun')::boolean END,
      false
    ),
    COALESCE(NULLIF(j.j->>'executionStatus','null'),'unknown'),
    COALESCE(NULLIF(j.j->>'executionTimeMs','null')::bigint, 0),
    NULLIF(j.j->>'startTimeMs','null')::bigint,
    COALESCE(
      NULLIF(j.j->>'startTimeIso','null')::timestamptz,
      CASE
        WHEN NULLIF(j.j->>'startTimeMs','null') IS NOT NULL
          THEN to_timestamp((j.j->>'startTimeMs')::double precision / 1000.0)::timestamptz
      END
    ),
    COALESCE(NULLIF(j.j->>'itemsOutCount','null')::int, 0),
    COALESCE(NULLIF(j.j->>'itemsOutTotalAllRuns','null')::int, 0)
  FROM j, rt
  WHERE rt.row_type = 'execution_node'
    AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM node_upd)
    AND NULLIF(j.j->>'workflowId','null') IS NOT NULL
    AND NULLIF(j.j->>'nodeType','null') IS NOT NULL
  RETURNING 'execution_node'::text AS inserted_type
)

SELECT
  COALESCE((SELECT inserted_type FROM exec_upsert LIMIT 1),
           (SELECT inserted_type FROM node_ins LIMIT 1),
           'noop') AS result;

SELECT
  w.id AS "workflowId",
  w.name,
  w.active,
  COALESCE(w."isArchived", false) AS "isArchived",
  w."createdAt",
  w."updatedAt",

  -- tags
  COALESCE(
    (
      SELECT jsonb_agg(t.name ORDER BY t.name)
      FROM workflows_tags wt
      JOIN tag_entity t ON t.id = wt."tagId"
      WHERE wt."workflowId" = w.id
    ),
    '[]'::jsonb
  ) AS "tags",

  -- nodesCount
  jsonb_array_length(COALESCE(w.nodes::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb)) AS "nodesCount",

  COALESCE(
    (
      SELECT jsonb_agg(DISTINCT (n->>'type'))
      FROM jsonb_array_elements(COALESCE(w.nodes::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb)) n
      WHERE (n->>'type') IS NOT NULL
    ),
    '[]'::jsonb
  ) AS "nodeTypesDistinct",

  COALESCE(
    (
      SELECT jsonb_agg(DISTINCT (n->>'name'))
      FROM jsonb_array_elements(COALESCE(w.nodes::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb)) n
      WHERE (n->>'name') IS NOT NULL
    ),
    '[]'::jsonb
  ) AS "nodeNamesDistinct"

FROM workflow_entity w
ORDER BY w."updatedAt" DESC
LIMIT 200;

INSERT INTO public.workflows_index
(
  instance_id,
  workflow_id,
  name,
  active,
  is_archived,
  created_at,
  updated_at,
  tags,
  nodes_count
)
VALUES
(
  $1,
  $2,
  $3,
  COALESCE($4, false),
  COALESCE($5, false),
  $6,
  $7,
  $8,
  $9
)
ON CONFLICT (workflow_id)
DO UPDATE SET
  instance_id  = EXCLUDED.instance_id,
  name         = EXCLUDED.name,
  active       = EXCLUDED.active,
  is_archived  = EXCLUDED.is_archived,
  created_at   = EXCLUDED.created_at,
  updated_at   = EXCLUDED.updated_at,
  tags         = EXCLUDED.tags,
  nodes_count  = EXCLUDED.nodes_count;

options.queryReplacement:
=`{{$json.instanceId}}`
`{{$json.workflowId}}`
`{{$json.name || null}}`
`{{$json.active ?? null}}`
`{{$json.isArchived ?? null}}`
`{{$json.createdAt || null}}`
`{{$json.updatedAt || null}}`
`{{$json.tags || []}}`
`{{$json.nodesCount ?? null}}`

parameters.content:
## n8n-trace Sync — Overview

This workflow keeps the n8n-trace database in sync with n8n executions.

It performs:

- Checkpoint tracking (last processed execution)
- Incremental ingestion
- Refresh of running executions
- Size-aware parsing (avoid huge payloads)
- Execution + node upserts
- Workflow metadata indexing

Goal: near-real-time observability without heavy DB load.

## Checkpoint Strategy

We store the highest execution ID already ingested.

Each run:

1. Fetch last processed ID from n8n-trace
2. Identify executions still running
3. Fetch only new or unfinished executions

This ensures:

- No duplicates
- Safe resume
- Efficient sync

## Bootstrap Mode

If the n8n-trace database is empty:

We start from recent executions instead of full history.

Reason:

Backfilling all executions can be expensive and slow.

n8n-trace behaves like a monitoring system — it observes from "now".

## Execution Size Guard

Execution payloads larger than ~5MB are not fully parsed.

Why:

Large execution_data can be heavy to decode and store.

Strategy:

- Small → parse runData and store nodes
- Large → store execution summary only

This prevents memory and DB pressure.

## runData Parsing

For small executions we:

- Decode execution_data
- Extract node runs
- Compute items out
- Track last executed node
- Generate execution + node rows

This enables deep observability in n8n-trace.

## Idempotent Upserts

All writes use UPSERT.

Benefits:

- Safe retries
- No duplicates
- Handles late status updates
- Supports running → finished transitions

Workflow can run continuously without conflicts.

## Large Execution Fallback

If execution is too large:

We still store:

- Status
- Timing
- Workflow ID

But skip node details.

This ensures we never miss executions while keeping sync lightweight.

## Workflow Index Sync

We periodically refresh workflow metadata:

- Name
- Tags
- Active state
- Node types

Used for dashboards and filtering.

Independent from execution sync.

### Triggers
Run every 5 Minutes (schedule) or via manual test. Both paths go into the same flow.

## Instance Selection

Defines which environment this workflow reports metrics for.

Set this value to match the current n8n instance
(e.g. prod, dev, test).

Metrics and snapshots will be tagged with this identifier
so dashboards can separate environments correctly.
